form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after having raced just once last campaign didn't finish the race at this track on November 5 over 3200m. When resuming last campaign pulled up at Sandown Park on March 8 2025 over 4000m. No surprise to see him back in form today.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having had just one run last campaign won by 5.5 len Uttoxeter on December 9 over 3200m on rain affected going defeating Nowmelad with 76.5kg at $9 in a hurdle. Also won first up last previous preparation. Sure to prove tough to stop.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Last outing finished second of 11 starters at this track on April 2 over 3200m, 7 len behind Hurricane Pat carrying 74kg at $3.30. Run before won by 1.3 len Warwick on March 8 over 3200m defeating Road To Wembley carrying 72kg at $13 in a hurdle. Continues to improve. Sure to prove tough to beat.

form.formComment: Last outing ran last at Wincanton on March 23 over 4000m, 55 len behind Moveit Like Minnie with 73.5kg at $13. The run before finished fifth of 7 runners at Taunton on February 12 over 3300m, on a wet track; 16 len behind Aurigny Mill with 67kg at $6.50. Needs to find best form.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation winning won by 1.75 len this track October 11 over 3200m defeating All The Glory with 68.5kg at $1.40. When resuming last campaign 5 of 9 runners at Uttoxeter June 29 over 3200m, 12 len behind Tara Iti with 76kg at $29. Reliable jumper with eight wins to his name from 29 appearances.

form.formComment: Last run finished sixth of 9 runners at Newbury on March 21 over 3800m, 15 len behind Storming George with 72kg at $7. Right in the mix if anywhere near his best.
